summary: Completed frontend testing of CEP auto-fill functionality in the registration form. All tests passed successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: The handleCEPChange function (lines 393-420) correctly implements the ViaCEP API integration
Toast notifications are properly displayed for both success and error cases
Address fields (street, neighborhood, city, state) are correctly auto-filled when a valid CEP is entered
